title: Nash Equilibrium Decision Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision-making process for two players in a strategic game, demonstrating how their choices lead to a Nash Equilibrium outcome.
relationships: Player 1 chooses a strategy based on Player 2's potential choices
Player 2 chooses a strategy based on Player 1's potential choices
Strategies intersect at a payoff outcome
Neither player can improve their payoff by unilaterally changing strategy at equilibrium
